message:
🐛 fix: emit deploy:result on failure and pass groupName to API (#2887)

- Catch block now publishes deploy:result with success=false so
  cards/UI receive a terminal failure event instead of hanging
- groupName is added to DeployRequest and passed through to the
  backend so cluster group selection is preserved

Fixes #2876, fixes #2875

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ export interface DeployRequest {
   namespace: string
   sourceCluster: string
   targetClusters: string[]
+  groupName?: string
   replicas?: number
 }
